candidates.why: Exact match for total current assets on the balance sheet.
Balancing/subtotal line, not preferred over the explicit total.
Wrong section of the balance sheet.

candidates.row_label: Gains and losses on the disposal of non-current assets
candidates.why: Cash flow line, unrelated to current assets.
Exact balance-sheet cash line for cash and cash equivalents.

candidates.row_label: Opening bank loans/cash and cash equivalents
candidates.why: Cash flow reconciliation line, not the balance-sheet cash stock variable requested.

candidates.row_label: Closing bank loans/cash and cash equivalents
candidates.why: Cash flow reconciliation line, not preferred when an explicit balance-sheet cash line exists.

candidates.row_label: Changes for the year in cash and cash equivalents
candidates.why: Flow, not stock.

variables.notes: Used the explicit balance-sheet cash line.

candidates.why: Exact match for total current liabilities.
Balancing line, not preferred over the explicit total.
Wrong maturity bucket.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit current liabilities total.

candidates.why: Appears in the current-liabilities section and is the cleanest reported current borrowing line; excludes lease wording.
Represents current maturities of long-term debt, but looks supplemental and may overlap with current Credit Institutions.

variables.notes: Chose the current-liabilities line 'Credit Institutions' as the best clean short-term debt measure. Excluded lease liabilities per rule. Did not add 'LT Debt within 1 Year' to avoid possible double counting with the reported current borrowing line.

candidates.why: Best match for taxes payable/current tax liability on the balance sheet.
Deferred tax is non-current/non-payable in nature and not TXP.
Asset/receivable, opposite of taxes payable.

variables.notes: No shortlist candidate existed, but 'Corporation tax' is a confident balance-sheet match for current taxes payable.

candidates.why: Best reported total for tangible fixed assets / PPE on the balance sheet.

candidates.row_label: Right of Use Tangible Assets, Gross
candidates.why: Only a component and lease-related; not preferred over total tangible assets.
Component and gross basis; also mostly blank in preview.

candidates.row_label: Plant, fixtures and fittings and equipment
candidates.why: Component of PPE, not the total.

variables.notes: Preferred the explicit total/net tangible assets line as the closest PPE total.

candidates.why: Exact match for total assets.

candidates.row_label: As Reported Cash from Operating Activities
candidates.why: Best match for net cash flow from operating activities / operating cash flow.

candidates.row_label: Cash generated from operations before changes in working capital and tax
candidates.why: Pre-working-capital and pre-tax subtotal, not net operating cash flow.

candidates.row_label: Cash Flow from Operating Activities before Changes in Working Capital
candidates.why: Subtotal before working-capital changes, not final operating cash flow.

final_choice.row_label: As Reported Cash from Operating Activities

variables.notes: Used the final reported operating cash flow line rather than pre-working-capital subtotals.
